texts.desc:
(1) Send cards from the top of your Deck to the GY up to the number of Traps in the GYs with different names +1 (max. 4), then you can apply 1 of these effects.
● Special Summon 1 of the monsters sent to the GY.
● Set 1 of the Spells/Traps sent to the GY, except “Corpse-Seller Crow”. If it is a Quick-Play Spell or a Trap, it can be activated this turn.
texts.name: Corpse-Seller Crow
texts.str2: Choose the number of cards to send to the GY
texts.str6: Activate by applying the effect of {CARD}.
